title: Item Protection Enchantments
body:
## Description

This mod introduces enchantments that protect and preserve items.

You can obtain these enchantments through librarian trades or the enchantment table.

Additionally, items with these enchantments will retain their enchantments even after being placed and picked up.  
Currently, **this only applies to shulker boxes**, but it may be extended to other items in the future.

## 📚Enchantments

**Fire Protection (Item)** - Your items will not disappear even if you enter fire or lava

![Your items will not disappear even if you enter fire or lava](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bdb513ea3d39b7d76ea2755db96440303e291e07.png)

**Cactus Protection (Item)** - Your items will not disappear even if you hit a cactus

![Your items will not disappear even if you hit a cactus](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3864fbb003a6097335eb4daee6b1241939445da0.png)

**Blast Protection (Item)** - Your items will not disappear even if an explosion occurs nearby

![Your items will not disappear even if an explosion occurs nearby](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7702104490ff441150c24d202be2d6e0d19c0b48.png)

**Void Protection (Item)** - If you fall into the void, you will be sent to a specified altitude to protect your items

![If you fall into the void, you will be sent to a specified altitude to protect your items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8bbc8aa841504f834590e027a059eff08748b2aa.png)

**Expire Protection (Item)** - Your items will not disappear due to time restrictions

![Your items will not disappear due to time restrictions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c431732d06044dea257494dc83d8b4e184befcbb.png)

**Inventory Holding** (treasure) - You will not drop your items even if you die

![You will not drop your items even if you die](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b9939a420b4292f2270c965621c7a9b419685b05_0.webp)

**Acid Protection (Item)** (Requires Alex's Caves) - Even if you enter acid, your items will not disappear, and equipment damage from acid will be eliminated

![Even if you enter acid, your items will not disappear, and equipment damage from acid will be eliminated](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/617388f9c7ea7c705dacfc49cfa3862e1cd7e596_0.webp)
